metadata.purpose: Claude/AI-first documentation system — generates docs for Claude project setup, AI implementations, and code documentation

claude-project.name: Claude Project Setup
claude-project.description: Full Claude project documentation generated from an idea: CLAUDE.md, project instructions, system guides, templates, builders
claude-project.primary_audience: Developers and teams implementing Claude projects

ai-docs.name: AI Documentation
ai-docs.description: Individual AI/Claude documentation: how-to guides, reference docs, feature docs, process docs for AI-powered workflows
ai-docs.primary_audience: AI engineers, vibe-coders, Claude users building workflows

code.name: Code Documentation
code.description: Technical code documentation with enforced coding standards: setup guides, API docs, architecture docs, ADRs

reference.name: Reference Material
reference.description: Configuration reference, schema documentation, command references — machine-readable and human-readable
